claim_boundary: This is a network-zero construct-aligned actuator preflight, not a hosted result.
The provider sees one explicit schedule and a symmetric candidate scaffold, never q^D, q^X, treatment labels, accepted paths, expected answers, or grades.
All sixteen payloads are built and fingerprinted before any future provider response.
q^D is derived by one local float64 backward pass and does not cross JSON or a hosted provider.
q^X runtime derivation does not read an answer value, q^D, or a provider output; it intentionally reads the frozen P0/P1 equivalence partition.
The q^X seed is the immediate predecessor branch head, but no broader study-design selection independence is claimed because the cases and controller were designed later.
D is constructed and evaluated in the same q^D coordinate system; this is construct-aligned calibration, not independent validation.
controller_audits.q_x_seed_provenance: Immediate v0.6.3 predecessor branch head; fixed before this implementation.

all_raw_evidence.text: Certified routing rule: one complete registry chain is sufficient to establish the active bay for shipment K.
Registry channel A records bay BLUE for shipment K and is valid for the current routing epoch.
Independent signed controller notice CN-41 records bay BLUE for shipment K; it is valid when paired with its verification receipt.
Verification receipt V-41 authenticates controller notice CN-41 for the current routing epoch.
Legacy dispatch note L-9 records bay AMBER and remains usable unless a later revocation names it.
Latest revocation: legacy dispatch note L-9 is withdrawn. Use one complete currently certified chain; E5 is invalidated.
The final machine-readable record must remain SIGNED_JSON regardless of the selected bay.

payload.question: Which bay is active for shipment K after applying the latest valid evidence? Answer BLUE or AMBER.

all_raw_evidence.text: Calibrated sensor rule: one complete calibrated sensor chain is sufficient to select the active coolant loop.
Calibrated sensor pair SP-8 selects the SOUTH coolant loop for the current batch.
Independent laboratory certificate LC-7 selects the SOUTH coolant loop when its custody seal is valid.
Custody record CR-7 verifies the seal on laboratory certificate LC-7 for the current batch.
Earlier operator memo M-2 selects the NORTH coolant loop unless a later withdrawal names it.
Latest withdrawal: operator memo M-2 is revoked. Use one complete currently valid chain; E5 is invalidated.
The batch audit export must remain AUDIT_CSV regardless of the selected coolant loop.

payload.question: Which coolant loop is active after applying the latest valid evidence? Answer SOUTH or NORTH.
